name: 3 Trowel Roll Holder
description: Compact 3-trowel roll holder — protects trowel blades, two reinforced eyelets for wall or rack hanging, fits trowels up to 18" × 5".
overview:
**Hammerex 3-Trowel Holder Roll**

Keep your finishing tools protected, organised, and ready for work with the Hammerex 3-Trowel Holder Roll — our most compact trowel storage solution.

Designed to securely hold up to 3 trowels measuring up to 18" × 5", this durable roll protects blades from damage during transport and storage while keeping your tools neatly organised throughout the workday.

Its compact design makes it easy to carry around the job site, load into your tool bag, or store away at the end of the day. For added convenience, the holder features two reinforced eyelets, allowing it to be hung on a site wall, workshop board, or storage area for quick access and tidy organisation.

Built for professionals who value protection, organisation and portability.

features.label: Holds up to 3 trowels up to 18" × 5"
Protects trowel blades during transport and storage
Two reinforced eyelets for hanging on walls or storage racks
Keeps tools organised and readily accessible
Ideal for plasterers, renderers and finishing professionals
